title: Lucid Group Inc Stock Analysis and Financial Data
text: Stock Analysis provides comprehensive financial data on Lucid Group, tracking key metrics including revenue, net loss, EPS, and cash position. Q1 2026 showed revenue of $282.5 million with net loss of $1.028 billion, reflecting margin pressure and operational challenges. Free cash flow continued negative at -$1.44 billion in Q1, indicating significant cash burn. The balance sheet shows approximately $3.2 billion in liquidity heading into Q2 2026, sufficient for several quarters of operations at current burn rates but inadequate without additional funding. Gross margins remain deeply negative, indicating the company has not yet achieved manufacturing efficiency. The analysis highlights that near-term profitability remains highly unlikely, with the company dependent on external capital to maintain operations.
